name: route-c-brainstorm
description: Checks that a multi-option Route C design prompt surfaces und-brainstorming in the initial skill order.

turns.prompt: A new high-risk multi-step development task is starting in this workspace. There are multiple viable technical approaches, and I want explicit option comparison before design. Do not run shell commands or edit files. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.
